description: Declarative source->canonical field map. Keys are canonical field names; each value lists the accepted source aliases (case-insensitive). When a record supplies a non-primary alias (e.g. 'value' for 'amount'), normalization maps it to canonical AND logs SCHEMA_DRIFT. This file is data, not code: a new field rename in the held-out seed is handled by adding an alias, never by touching the pipeline.
